name: merge_widget
title: PDF Merger Tutorial
description: Learn how to merge multiple PDF files into one document

steps.text:
📁 Add PDF Files to Merge

Add multiple PDF files that you want to merge into a single document. The order matters for the final result!

📋 File Order Management

Drag and drop files to reorder them. The order here determines the order in the final merged PDF.

💡 Top file = First pages in merged PDF

📝 Output Filename

Enter the name for your merged PDF file. Don't include the .pdf extension - it's added automatically.

🔗 Merge PDFs

All set? Click here to merge your PDFs into a single document! The process preserves quality and bookmarks.
